body:
### Problem

I was trying to port my neovim config to v0.12 and noticed a crash, was able to find a minimal reproduction on the master itself.
All of the conditions mentioned in the reproduction need to be present to trigger a crash.


### Steps to reproduce

```lua
require('vim._core.ui2').enable()
vim.cmd [[
set rtp+=$LMAO " Cannot be a non-existing dir, needs to be an env var which does not exist
set syntax
]]
```

### Expected behavior

Setting a non-existent env var does not make sense but not sure if we should crash on this? 

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

v0.13.0-dev-519+g7d99104058

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

no

### Operating system/version

macOS 15.7.4

### Terminal name/version

ghostty 1.3.1

### $TERM environment variable

tmux-256color

### Installation

build from repo
